name: win_full_path
description:
Cheat to flight (skipping ground-blocking terrain), BFS to the buried scepter, search the tile, confirm — game ends in a victory. With seed=1 the scepter lands at (40,52) in continentia (foot-reachable from spawn (11,58) once flight is granted). On_foe=skip declines hostile encounters from foes_follow collisions.

This is the 'is the game winnable' nightly assertion. Seed-fragile by design: world layout changes break it. If the seed needs updating, scan: ./build/openbounty-playtest --scenario tools/scenarios/probe_scepter.json (or rerun the seed sweep) and pick a seed where state.scepter.zone == continentia. Tagged nightly so test-scenarios skips it.
